---
title: "Miscellaneous"
---

This page collects selected academic material that does not fit neatly into publications, talks, or formal notes. This includes selected undergraduate work, reading programs, and research-adjacent academic material.

## Selected Undergraduate Work

- **Thickness-Dependent Photoluminescence in Exfoliated WSe₂**
  PHYS 431L, University of Maryland, Baltimore County, May 2026.
  Presentation on optical evidence for monolayer WSe₂ using photoluminescence spectroscopy and A-exciton emission.
  [Slides](files/phys431_monolayer.pptx)
